final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID badge mockup for ByteDance (字节跳动), front and back sides, intended for internal HR or onboarding materials.

Style/medium: photorealistic corporate ID badge mockup with clean modern tech company aesthetic
Composition: two badges shown side by side — left showing front face with photo and name, right showing back face with QR code and company info
Subject: ByteDance employee badge featuring employee photo placeholder, name field, employee ID number, company logo, department text; back side with QR code, emergency contact, and company address
Scene/backdrop: neutral soft shadow surface, badges lying flat with subtle depth of field
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, professional and trustworthy atmosphere
Color palette: ByteDance brand colors — black, white, with signature blue accent
Materials/textures: matte laminated PVC card stock with slight sheen, rounded corners, realistic card thickness visible at edges
Text (verbatim): 字节跳动, ByteDance
Constraints: both front and back visible, realistic card proportions (standard credit card size 85.6mm x 54mm), photo-realistic rendering
Avoid: cartoon style, flat illustration, exaggerated shadows, missing back side, incorrect proportions
